insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure future compatibility.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook. They should also ensure that their extensions do not rely on the block_progress capability. This change affects the Checkout UI extensions API and may require updates to the extension's code to maintain functionality. Developers should test their extensions with the latest API version to ensure compatibility.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to remove the deprecated hook. They should encourage their developers to update the extensions to ensure a smooth checkout experience.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is important because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which are critical to the merchant's checkout experience. Developers must update their extensions to ensure compatibility with future API versions.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, starting with API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions now result in fewer breaking changes, giving server-side code more control over handling field mismatches.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically, resolving the URL on every execution and using the new URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, including updates to App Update Javy dependencies and GCS bundle upload status validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Updated App Store Requirements: All apps must use honest and transparent review practices, as outlined in policy 1.3.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting with API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting with version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS extensions, app pricing, and APIs

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. This allows for more flexibility in POS extension development and better handling of discounts.

themes.title: App Pricing and Shopify Flow
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Shopify Flow has also been updated with changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and automatic updates to Action runtime URLs.

themes.title: API Updates and Deprecations
themes.detail: The Customer Account API has removed the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree, and the Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision. The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum has also been updated to return FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill.

actions.text: Update POS extensions to use the new background extension target
Review and update app pricing plans to take advantage of new limits and features
Test and update apps to ensure compatibility with API version 2026-10
